settings.html:
FSI Offers is a single platform combining cash offer aggregation, website visitor intelligence, property marketing pages, skip trace, and CRM automation. The platform is included with Five Star Alliance and every premium FSI membership.

The free tier is open to any real estate professional. No membership required. Alliance unlocks the full platform with 15 enriched leads per month, plus everything else Five Star Institute membership includes.
